ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "sid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "version_no" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "textdata1" TEXT /* Text data field 1 */,
  "intdata1" INTEGER /* Integer data field 1 */,
  "datedata1" TEXT /* Date and time field 1 */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data record is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the data record belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sid", "version_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sid" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_no" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was registered */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is deleted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_sid FOREIGN KEY ("sid") REFERENCES data_records ("sid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used during the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the session is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "sid" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_no" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used during the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_sid FOREIGN KEY ("sid") REFERENCES data_records ("sid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data backup */,
  "sid" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_no" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date the backup was performed */,
  "backup_file" TEXT /* File path to the backup file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the backup */,
  "is_restored" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the backup has been restored */,
  "restored_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who restored the backup */,
  "restored_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the backup was restored */,
  "backup_size" INTEGER /* Size of the backup file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backups_sid FOREIGN KEY ("sid") REFERENCES data_records ("sid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backups_restored_by FOREIGN KEY ("restored_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "sid" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validation rule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the validation rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_sid FOREIGN KEY ("sid") REFERENCES data_records ("sid")
)
